capabilities.name: Lost-reason codes
capabilities.verify: LIVE E2E VERIFIED on rzhj 2026-07-05 after the read-path fix deployed (Stage-3): manage_deal action=get (new) returned the closed_lost test deal WITH lost_reason='other', lost_note and closed_at visible — the fields an earlier run proved were written but hidden. Write path verified 2026-07-05 (stage=lost stores lost_reason, echoed). WRITE PATH LIVE-VERIFIED on rzhj 2026-07-05 (Stage-3): manage_deal update stage=lost normalized to closed_lost and stored lost_reason='price' (echoed in the response); move_stage closed_lost with lost_reason='other' also worked. deals.lost_reason/lost_note (migration 20260704110000); LostReasonDialog prompts on closed_lost (DealKanban drop, DealsPage table select, DealDetailPage select); useUpdateDeal clears closed_at+lost fields on re-open to an active stage; manage_deal update/move_stage accept lost_reason/lost_note with clear-on-reopen (agent-execute executeDealsAction); reason shown on DealDetailPage; feeds lead_pipeline_review win_loss rollup
capabilities.notes: Read-path bug (fields missing from list select; no get action) caught live 2026-07-05, fixed in agent-execute, redeployed and re-verified. Clear-on-reopen implemented in applyLostDiscipline (shared by update + move_stage).
